isRobotsAllowed.errorMessage: The page is blocked by robots.txt rules.

isNoindexPresent.errorMessage: A 'noindex' directive was discovered in meta tags, blocking search indexation.

hasTitle.errorMessage: The meta title tag is missing or empty.

isCanonicalValid.errorMessage: The canonical URL is missing or does not match the current page URL.

hasSingleH1.errorMessage: The page does not contain exactly one H1 tag.
